label: Primary creator
description: Original creator/group record; use only when source identity is verified.

label: Primary distribution
description: Channel used for first-party distribution such as Telegram.

label: Official social
description: Account represented in reporting as official or self-identified official; verify periodically.

label: Platform removed
description: Historical record of a source removed or suspended by a platform.

label: Mirror
description: Third-party mirror or reupload; never treat as original source.

label: Amplifier
description: Account/outlet that amplifies or reposts content.

label: Coverage / wire
description: Wire report or syndicated factual coverage.

label: Coverage / platform policy
description: Coverage of removals, bans, suspensions, or platform moderation.

label: Coverage / clip reference
description: News item referencing or embedding a specific clip.

label: Source/statistics page
description: Stats, directory, linkhub or non-primary discovery page.

label: Monitor only
description: Watchlist source; not yet verified for inclusion as active source.

label: Candidate primary creator
description: Candidate creator/channel; requires manual verification before primary classification.

label: Verified channel
description: Verified channel record used for discovery and source-family grouping.
